page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Rapid mapping-based isoform quantification from rna-seq reads.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A software tool that implements a novel, is an alignment-free algorithm for the estimation of isoform abundances directly from a set of reference sequences and RNA-seq reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A software tool that implements a novel, is an alignment-free algorithm for the estimation of isoform abundances directly from a set of reference sequences and RNA-seq reads.
